creator: support@paymydoctors.online
text:
At present, trying to set S_ISGID within a Linux-based jail results in an EPERM error. Since the preferred behavior (inherit group membership for new files) aligns with BSD's standard approach, the most practical solution is to ignore this bit within the jail environment, avoiding unnecessary error triggers.
.
